items.name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️Authentic Grade Packaging as shown
Chanel 23c Early Spring Collection🌿
Enamel Black & White Check Ball Mini Square Fat Black
23c Early Spring Soccer Checkered Square Fat One⚽️
I really love this mini❕Suitable for a sporty style
The adjustable enamel metal ball not only features exquisite craftsmanship
but also offers many ways to carry〰️
Crossbody, Shoulder, Handheld, Underarm bag. Looks small,
but surprisingly large capacity❕
The design concept for this season is the F1 victory flag,
making it instantly younger and trendier than the classic style.
Black is very versatile, suitable for all seasons, sweet or chic.
Whoever wears it looks good〰️
Hardware: Full steel 14k pale gold clasp/Enamel black & white check
Leather: Exclusive ZP calfskin from the sourcing department
Size: 13*20 *7 cm
